top_signals.title: US and Iran Agree to Halt War, SpaceX Jumps | The Pulse 6/15/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Tina Fordham, Fordham Global Foresight Founder & Geopolitical Strategist; Karen Ward, JPMorgan Asset Management EMEA Chief Market Strategist; Maxim Timchenko, DTEK Group CEO (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Middle East ceasefire, Fed interest-rate decision: Crypto Week Ahead
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: HUI (HUI:VSE) Merges Traditional and Crypto Finance: Commences Continuous Trading in Vienna With Leading Market Maker and Announces Impending Token Listing on Major Global Exchange
top_signals.summary: The first SaaS SuperApp for startups and VCs capitalizes on a $25M round a from Nimbus Capital and a +15% stock surge, unveiling a v3/v4 roadmap that bridges public equity with digital asset liquidity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
